summary: Light Therapy Resonance Name Engine testing complete. 19/19 tests passed. All new phi-seeded naming features working correctly: 3 naming styles (Lakota Sky, Mineral, Wellness), deterministic naming, resonance name in h1 title, blend indicator, Immerse button, and immersive session view.
test_credentials: Not required - Light Therapy works without authentication
context_for_next_testing_agent: Light Therapy Resonance Name Engine fully functional. Phi-seeded deterministic naming generates unique names for each color combination. Three naming styles available: Lakota Sky (e.g., 'Anpo Root', 'Keya Jade'), Mineral (e.g., 'Onyx Ridge'), Wellness (e.g., 'Infinite Anchor'). Same color combo always produces same name in each style. Resonance name appears in h1 title, blend indicator, Immerse button text, and immersive session view when 2+ colors selected. Single color shows color name only. Deselecting back to 1 color removes resonance name display.

tests_executed.details: Color selector loads with all color options
All 7 colors present: red, orange, yellow, green, blue, indigo, violet

tests_executed.test: 3. Single color shows NO resonance name
tests_executed.details: Resonance name element not visible with single color selection

tests_executed.test: 4. Single color h1 shows color name
tests_executed.details: H1 shows 'Red — Vitality' for single red selection
Blend indicator visible when 2 colors selected
Style selector container visible with 2+ colors
Lakota Sky, Mineral, Wellness buttons all present
Switching back to Lakota returns same 'Anpo Root' name

tests_executed.test: 12. Resonance name in h1 title (2+ colors)
tests_executed.details: H1 shows 'Anpo Root' when 2 colors selected
Full-screen session with breathing orb and timer
Session shows 'Anpo Root' below breath text

tests_executed.test: 16. Deselecting to 1 color removes resonance name
tests_executed.details: Resonance name element hidden when back to single color

tests_executed.test: 17. H1 returns to single color name after deselect
tests_executed.details: H1 shows 'Red — Vitality' after deselecting second color
Unselected colors have opacity: 0.3 when 3 colors selected
Toggle shows 'Sound On' and controls Web Audio API

feature_verification.resonance_name_engine: WORKING - Phi-seeded deterministic naming generates unique names
feature_verification.three_naming_styles: WORKING - Lakota Sky, Mineral, Wellness styles available
feature_verification.style_switching: WORKING - Clicking style buttons changes resonance name
feature_verification.deterministic_naming: WORKING - Same color combo always produces same name per style
feature_verification.resonance_in_h1: WORKING - H1 title shows resonance name with 2+ colors
feature_verification.resonance_in_blend_indicator: WORKING - Blend indicator displays resonance name
feature_verification.resonance_in_immerse_button: WORKING - Button text includes resonance name
feature_verification.resonance_in_session: WORKING - Immersive session shows resonance name below breath text
feature_verification.single_color_behavior: WORKING - Shows color name only, no resonance name
feature_verification.deselect_behavior: WORKING - Resonance name removed when back to 1 color
feature_verification.max_3_colors: WORKING - Remaining colors dimmed at max selection
feature_verification.audio_toggle: WORKING - Sound On/Off controls Web Audio API
